scripts.db:up: docker run -d --name job-star-db -e POSTGRES_DB=job_star -e POSTGRES_USER=jobstar -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=jobstar -p 5432:5432 postgres:16-alpine
scripts.db:down: docker stop job-star-db && docker rm job-star-db
scripts.db:init: docker exec -i job-star-db psql -U jobstar -d job_star < sql/schema.sql
scripts.db:reset: docker stop job-star-db 2>/dev/null; docker rm job-star-db 2>/dev/null; npm run db:up && sleep 3 && npm run db:init
